title: Shadow in the Warp
text: All enemy units and models with the [[Psyker]], [[Psychic Pilot]] or [[Brotherhood of Psykers]] special rules take a -1 penalty on rolls to harness warp charges whilst they are within synapse range of one or more models with the Shadow in the Warp special rule, but do not suffer Perils of the Warp on double 6s.
creator: Jeanbeaux
description: The unfathomable presence of the Hive Mind radiates out from its synapse creatures, smothering the ability of the psykers who stand before them to draw upon their mystic powers.
